name: Annex Animal Hospital
description: Quality veterinary care in a modern facility
longDescription: This friendly veterinary clinic is dedicated to providing high-quality care for all your furry friends. The experienced staff consists of passionate professionals who treat every pet with love and compassion.

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-in appointments?
faqs.answer: We accept walk-ins for emergencies, but recommend scheduling appointments for routine care.

faqs.question: What are your hours?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, and Saturday 9am-2pm.
